title: Designing money: how to build a trustworthy brand in the age of AI
speakers: Chris Warner (Creative Lead, Brand Studio, Plaid)
key_points: Explores how to pair machine learning with true artistry in brand and graphic design, and what it means to build a trustworthy financial brand in the age of AI.
Frames the central questions Plaid's team confronted while reshaping how money looks and feels: what's moral, what's safe, and what genuinely resonates in this new creative world.
Examines how authenticity has shaped the history of finance through the lens of graphic design and branding.
Considers what machine learning means for the future of financial design and brand-building.
